---
title: "Session 7: Advanced topics"
pagetitle: "Session 7"
---

# Advanced topics

This session covers advanced visualisation and deployment.

## Learning objectives

- Visualise large datasets
- Integrate OSM networks
- Deploy work as web applications
- Use GitHub Pages for publishing

## Large dataset visualisation

```r
library(tmap)

# Use simplification for large datasets
zones_simplified = rmapshaper::ms_simplify(zones)
tm_shape(zones_simplified) +
  tm_polygons()
```

## Deploying to GitHub Pages

```bash
# Build the site
quarto render

# Publish to GitHub Pages
quarto publish gh-pages
```
